title: Degree Symbol: Copy & Paste ° Temperature & Angle Signs
meta_description: Copy and paste the degree symbol (°) plus Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin, angle, prime, and geometry signs. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The degree sign (°) and every temperature, angle, prime, and geometry symbol that goes with it. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The degree symbol marks temperature, angles, and coordinates. This library gathers the degree sign with the Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin marks, a full set of angle signs, the prime characters used for minutes and seconds, and the geometry symbols that accompany them.
